name: rupeezy-voice-agent-sarvam-demo
description: Local Rupeezy voice agent demo with a Vite-served frontend and FastAPI backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:frontend: node scripts/print-url.js Frontend http://localhost:5173 && vite frontend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173
scripts.dev:backend: node scripts/print-url.js Backend http://127.0.0.1:8000 && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --app-dir backend
